title: Dedicatory epigram
support: Four joining marble fragments of a plaque damaged in the upper left corner and below; smooth behind. Combined dimensions given below (thicker towards the upper right). A further fragment from the upper left was seen by Kaibel and Tardia before him, but now lost.

layout.p: Lines 1-4 are more centred, and there is a space between lines 4 and 5.

handNote.lettering: A with an upward sloping cross-bar, Ε, Σ, Ω lunate. Traces of guidelines.

provenanceFound._: Original discovery not recorded; probably from Catania.

provenanceObserved._: Observed by Ferrara among the inscriptions in the house of the Giuseppe Recupero

graphics.desc: I.Sicily with the permission of the Assessorato Regionale dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana - Dipartimento dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana

location.address: Castello Ursino, Piazza Federico II di Svevia, 95121 Catania (CT)
